---
title: "Exploratory data analysis"
subtitle: "Exercise 1"
date: 2026-03-23
format: 
  live-html:
    code-copy: true
webr:
  packages:
    - tidyverse
    - lterdatasampler
    - palmerpenguins
---

{{< include ../_extensions/r-wasm/live/_knitr.qmd >}}
---

Use the code below to answer the questions in the exercise report file. You are encouraged to work together, but you must each submit an individual report. If you refer to a figure or table, copy it into your report.


```{r}

```
